label: break.interrupt (X breaks Y — Y is a continuing happening and because of what X does it stops; as in "break a streak" / "break the cycle", NOT as in "break a glass")
pattern: frame-null cluster (design §1.3 row break.interrupt): a continuing something stops because of a doing
gloss: X did something to Y at some time; before this time Y was happening for some time; because of this, after this time Y is not happening.
notes: Frame-null cluster (no single pinned FrameNet frame carries this break LU reading); two-member within-frame-null cluster disclosed per R3: v-00364717 (terminate a streak/cycle) + v-02541382 (interrupt a continued activity). The design's illustrative third member v-02752324 ('the flat plain was broken by tall mesas') is EXCLUDED by this authoring pass: it is stative/spatial (no event, no time), so this temporal explication would misdescribe it — R3(b) truthful-coverage forbids the cluster. Disclosed authoring act.

sense.glossQuote: terminate; "break a lucky streak"; "break the cycle of poverty" / interrupt a continued activity; "She had broken with the traditional patterns"
